title: Bordscape
description: Bordscape is a fun and educational escape room set in the board game cafe Spellenwereld. The player is tasked with solving board game-related puzzles by looking around the cafe to find the hidden pieces to open the vault containing treasure.

paragraph_1.heading: GOAL
paragraph_1.text: The puzzles in the game teach the player about different aspects of the wide array of board games present, and familiarize teenagers with games they might not have heard about before.

paragraph_2.heading: HOW TO PLAY
paragraph_2.text: Bordscape is played in landscape mode and playable on android devices. The puzzles are on mobile, but clues to help the players out can be found within the cafe. This allows the players to look around for the answers in the real world for the digital puzzles. True immersion! The game will be downloadable at the cafe through a provided QR-code.

article.tagline: Stealing the treasure requires hard work

paragraph_3.heading: IN APP
paragraph_3.text: 3 different rooms representing the different areas of the cafe. 7 unique puzzles based on different board- and card games. A fun experience.
